# TheKhan — thekhan.io

> Independent web design and marketing studio founded by Omair Khan in Deerfield, Illinois. Custom-coded websites and monthly SEO / Google Ads marketing for home service and local businesses across Chicagoland and nationwide.

## Services
- Custom Website Design & Development: /websites
- Marketing for Home Service & Local Businesses (SEO, Google Ads, GBP): /marketing
- Intent Marketing vs Interruption Marketing (AEO/GEO explainer): /why-intent

## About
- Founder story and background: /about
- Portfolio of client work: /portfolio

## Key Facts
- Founder: Omair Khan, Deerfield, IL
- Marketing: $950/month, month-to-month, 72-hour cancel
- Website builds: from $750 one-time, no retainer required
- Founder previously grew his own home service company before pivoting to marketing
- Serves Chicagoland + remote clients nationwide
